use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for social media interfaces
Social sharing triggers for content platforms
Navigation action triggers with multiple visual variants
Accessible button components with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style atomic button component with configurable variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports composition via Radix UI Slot with asChild prop for flexible rendering. Follows Tailwind CSS utility patterns with ring-based focus states for accessibility. Designed as a reusable input component for social media and content-sharing interfaces.
